what_is_bazi_p1: BaZi (Four Pillars) is based on the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches of the year, month, day, and hour at birth, combined with solar terms and true solar time.
what_is_bazi_p2: The system converts overseas birth time to China time zone, then to lunar calendar, and finally uses the capital city’s true solar time to produce accurate BaZi.
intro: Enter your birth info; the system uses true solar time for professional charting.
birth_city_placeholder: Enter city name (optional; default uses capital’s solar time)
login_hint: Login to save your chart history.
body_strong_desc: Day Master is in season, strong energy, decisive but needs to avoid being too self-centered.
body_strong_career: Suitable for leadership roles, management, entrepreneurship, military/police, sports, etc.
body_strong_daily: Exercise to release excess energy, learn to listen, practice meditation.
body_strong_caution: Avoid arrogance and conflicts, be careful of physical injuries, do not expand blindly.
body_weak_desc: Day Master is out of season, weaker energy, good at cooperation but may lack independence.
body_weak_career: Suitable for teamwork, support roles, planning, research, technical support, etc.
body_weak_daily: Read and learn, make good friends, keep regular hours, strengthen physical health.
body_weak_caution: Avoid overexertion, do not take high risks alone, beware of petty people.
shensha_tianyi_desc: The most auspicious star, turns danger into safety, help from noble people.
shensha_yima_desc: Represents travel, movement, migration. Indicates changes in job or residence.
shensha_taohua_desc: Represents romance, charm, social relations. Good for social/arts, but beware of scandals.
personality_wood_trait: Kind, upright, progressive, growing like a tree.
personality_fire_trait: Passionate, polite, impatient, warm like fire.
personality_earth_trait: Honest, steady, tolerant, grounding like earth.
personality_metal_trait: Righteous, decisive, tough, sharp like metal.
personality_water_trait: Wise, flexible, changeable, flowing like water.
advice_supplement_wood: Lack Wood: Contact nature, wear green, live near plants. Jobs: Education, Forestry, Furniture.
advice_supplement_fire: Lack Fire: Sunbathe, wear red, live in sunny places. Jobs: Energy, Food, Arts.
advice_supplement_earth: Lack Earth: Contact soil, wear yellow, live in stable places. Jobs: Real Estate, Construction.
advice_supplement_metal: Lack Metal: Wear metal jewelry, wear white. Jobs: Finance, Machinery, Jewelry.
advice_supplement_water: Lack Water: Near water, wear black/blue. Jobs: Logistics, Trade, Marine.
advice_control_wood: Excess Wood: Use Metal to prune or Fire to release. Avoid stubborness.
advice_control_fire: Excess Fire: Use Water to control or Earth to release. Control emotions.
advice_control_earth: Excess Earth: Use Wood to loosen or Metal to release. Exercise more.
advice_control_metal: Excess Metal: Use Fire to forge or Water to release. Be compassionate.
advice_control_water: Excess Water: Use Earth to dam or Wood to release. Be grounded.
dayun_bijian_desc: Strong self-awareness, desire for independence. Competition or partnership.
dayun_jiecai_desc: More social activities, high expenses. Possible loss through friends.
dayun_shishen_desc: Talented, happy, good food. Good for learning, maybe lazy.
dayun_shishen_advice: Use talents; don't be too lazy.
dayun_shangguan_desc: Quick mind, rebellious. Good for innovation, bad for authority.
dayun_zhengcai_desc: Stable income, focus on reality. Good for marriage (men).
dayun_piancai_desc: Fluctuating wealth, opportunities. Generous and social.
dayun_qisha_desc: High pressure, challenges, power. Solve problems.
dayun_zhengyin_desc: Learning, degree, noble help. Peaceful mind.
dayun_zhengyin_advice: Learn hard; don't rely on others.
yongshen_wood_career: Wood related: Furniture, Paper, Education, Medicine.
yongshen_fire_career: Fire related: Energy, Food, Arts, Electronics.
yongshen_fire_relationship: Partner: Warm, red face. Snake/Horse/Fire strong.
yongshen_earth_career: Earth related: Real Estate, Construction, Agriculture.
yongshen_metal_career: Metal related: Finance, Machinery, Jewelry, Law.
yongshen_metal_relationship: Partner: Fair skin, tough. Monkey/Rooster/Metal strong.
yongshen_water_career: Water related: Logistics, Trade, Marine, Tourism.
yongshen_water_relationship: Partner: Smart, round face. Pig/Rat/Water strong.
shensha_taiji_desc: Spiritual, mysterious, good fortune in later life.
shensha_tiande_desc: Star of mitigation, indicates kindness and deep blessings.
shensha_yuede_desc: Star of hidden merit, turns danger into safety, harmonious relationships.
shensha_wenchang_desc: Intelligence, literary talent, good for studies and creation.
shensha_huagai_desc: Artistic talent, religious tendency, prone to loneliness.
shensha_yangren_desc: Strong will, decisive, impulsive, risk of injury.
shensha_kuigang_desc: Strong character, decisive, authoritative, risk of conflict.
shensha_guasu_desc: Loneliness, weak affinity with opposite sex.
compatibility_desc: Enter the second person's birth info for compatibility analysis
ai_load_fail: AI analysis failed to load, please try again
share_card_fail: Share card generation failed, please try again
pdf_export_fail: PDF export failed, please try again
compatibility_short_desc: Analyze destiny compatibility between two people
ai_fallback: AI analysis requires DeepSeek API key. Set DEEPSEEK_API_KEY environment variable to enable.
ai_intro_desc: Powered by DeepSeek AI, combined with thousands of years of BaZi wisdom, delivering your personalized in-depth analysis
ai_intro_feature1_desc: Analyze your Day Master traits, Five Element tendencies, and inner personality
ai_intro_feature2_desc: Yong Shen based career direction and wealth management advice
ai_intro_feature3_desc: Decode relationship patterns and marriage fortune in your chart
ai_intro_feature4_desc: Five Element balance based health tips and remedies
personality_preview_earth: Reliable & steady, loyal, great at maintaining
liunian_note: The following is a yearly trend analysis based on your chart structure.
verify_p1: This system uses true solar time at birth location.
verify_p2: If birth time is unknown, the Hour Pillar is excluded.
verify_p3: Solar term transitions are calculated at exact times.
disclaimer_p1: This analysis is for cultural and entertainment purposes only.
disclaimer_p2: Results are for personal reference only.
disclaimer_p3: Do not use for medical, legal, or financial decisions.
wuxing_explain_p1: The Five Elements (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water) describe the nature and interactions of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches.
wuxing_explain_p2: Wood feeds Fire, Fire creates Earth, Earth bears Metal, Metal carries Water, Water nourishes Wood.
yongshen_explain_p1: Yong Shen is the preferred element to balance your chart. It emphasizes your ideal energy direction.
yongshen_explain_p2: When the chart is strong, the Yong Shen tends toward draining elements; when weak, toward supporting elements.
dayun_explain_p1: Luck Pillars run in 10-year phases starting from your birth.
dayun_explain_p2: Each Luck Pillar carries a Stem-Branch theme representing energy shifts.
dayun_explain_p3: Explanations use everyday language and avoid absolute statements.
wx_wood_personality: Wood people are kind, upright, and ambitious. Creative and principled.
wx_wood_career: Education, culture, design, forestry, home furnishing, fashion, publishing, medicine.
wx_wood_health: Wood governs liver and eyes. Maintain emotional balance, sleep well, exercise.
wx_wood_advice: Connect with nature and cultivate kindness, but avoid being too rigid.
wx_fire_personality: Fire people are passionate, polite, and energetic. Strong action and expression.
wx_fire_career: Energy, food service, entertainment, beauty, advertising, electronics, internet.
wx_fire_health: Fire governs heart and blood. Control emotions, avoid overexcitement.
wx_fire_advice: Stay passionate and positive, but learn to control temper and emotions.
wx_earth_personality: Earth people are honest, steady, and tolerant. Reliable and loyal.
wx_earth_career: Real estate, construction, agriculture, warehousing, antiques, management.
wx_earth_health: Earth governs spleen and stomach. Eat regularly, avoid overeating.
wx_earth_advice: Stay grounded and steady, but avoid stagnation. Learn new things.
wx_metal_personality: Metal people are righteous, decisive, and firm. Strong execution and principles.
wx_metal_career: Finance, hardware, machinery, automotive, jewelry, law, military, auditing.
wx_metal_health: Metal governs lungs and bones. Protect respiratory system, avoid cold.
wx_metal_advice: Stay decisive and principled, but cultivate compassion. Avoid being too rigid.
wx_water_personality: Water people are wise, flexible, and adaptable. Smart and sociable.
wx_water_career: Logistics, transportation, trade, aquaculture, tourism, media, consulting.
wx_water_health: Water governs kidneys and urinary system. Stay warm, sleep well.
wx_water_advice: Stay wise and flexible, but avoid being too slippery. Build stability.
wx_analysis_strong_fire_weak_wood: Fire is the strongest element, making you passionate and expressive. Wood is the weakest, suggesting room for growth in creativity and planning.
wx_analysis_balanced: The Five Elements are relatively balanced, with even distribution across all aspects.
advice_career_wood_strong: Suited for education, culture, design. Strong Wood means leadership roles.
advice_career_wood_weak: Suited for education, culture, design. Weaker Wood suits support roles.
advice_career_fire_strong: Suited for energy, entertainment, internet. Strong Fire suits creative roles.
advice_career_fire_weak: Suited for energy, entertainment, internet. Weaker Fire suits behind-the-scenes work.
advice_career_earth_strong: Suited for real estate, construction, management. Strong Earth suits management.
advice_career_earth_weak: Suited for real estate, construction, management. Weaker Earth suits execution roles.
advice_career_metal_strong: Suited for finance, law, auditing. Strong Metal suits management.
advice_career_metal_weak: Suited for finance, law, auditing. Weaker Metal suits technical roles.
advice_career_water_strong: Suited for logistics, trade, media. Strong Water suits diplomatic roles.
advice_career_water_weak: Suited for logistics, trade, media. Weaker Water suits research roles.
advice_career_default: Choose a career based on your strengths.
advice_wealth_wood: Wealth is linked to networks and growth. Focus on long-term investment.
advice_wealth_fire: Wealth is linked to expression and social skills. Earn with your talents.
advice_wealth_earth: Wealth is stable. Focus on long-term investment and real estate.
advice_wealth_metal: Wealth is linked to judgment. Focus on investment and finance.
advice_wealth_water: Wealth is flexible. Suited for trade and流通 industries.
advice_wealth_default: Maintain stable income and invest carefully.
advice_love_wood: Proactive in love but sometimes too stubborn. Learn to be flexible.
advice_love_fire: Passionate in love but emotional. Learn to stay calm and tolerant.
advice_love_earth: Stable in love but sometimes unromantic. Learn to express affection.
advice_love_metal: Rational in love but not expressive. Learn to be gentle.
advice_love_water: Flexible in love but sometimes unfaithful. Learn to be stable.
advice_love_default: Cherish those around you and nurture your relationships.
advice_health_wood: Watch liver and eye health. Stay emotionally balanced and exercise.
advice_health_fire: Watch heart and blood health. Control emotions and maintain regular sleep.
advice_health_earth: Watch digestive health. Eat regularly and avoid overeating.
advice_health_metal: Watch respiratory health. Avoid cold and breathe fresh air.
advice_health_water: Watch kidney health. Stay warm and avoid staying up late.
advice_health_default: Maintain regular routines, exercise, and periodic checkups.
advice_study_wood: Suited for culture, education, design — creative subjects.
advice_study_fire: Suited for media, arts, internet — expressive subjects.
advice_study_earth: Suited for management, finance, construction — stable subjects.
advice_study_metal: Suited for finance, law, engineering — logical subjects.
advice_study_water: Suited for languages, trade, media — flexible subjects.
advice_study_default: Find your interests and keep learning.
advice_social_wood: Sincere in socializing but sometimes too direct. Learn diplomacy.
advice_social_fire: Warm and popular in socializing. Stay humble.
advice_social_earth: Steady and trustworthy in socializing. Be more proactive.
advice_social_metal: Rational in socializing. Learn to care for others.
advice_social_water: Flexible and adaptable in socializing. Stay genuine.
advice_social_default: Be sincere and kind, and interact with others.
advice_social_taohua: Strong romantic charm. Be careful to distinguish genuine feelings.
advice_social_tianyi: Noble people often help you. Cherish your benefactors.
advice_overall_strong_default: Your Day Master is strong. Take initiative and lead. Your destiny is in your own hands.
advice_overall_strong_stars_good: Your Day Master is strong with auspicious stars. Noble people will help you throughout life.
advice_overall_strong_stars_bad: Your Day Master is strong, but watch for risks from inauspicious stars.
advice_overall_strong_stars_mixed: Your Day Master is strong. Auspicious stars bring help, but watch for risks.
advice_overall_weak_default: Your Day Master is weak. Rely on teamwork and support. Your destiny is in your own hands.
advice_overall_weak_stars_good: Your Day Master is weak, but auspicious stars bring noble helpers.
advice_overall_weak_stars_bad: Your Day Master is weak. Watch for risks from inauspicious stars.
advice_overall_weak_stars_mixed: Your Day Master is weak. Stars bring both help and risk.
shensha_tianyi_summary: Most auspicious star. Noble people help you through difficulties.
shensha_tianyi_detail: Nobleman is the most important star in BaZi. Those with Nobleman often receive help from important people. In Year Pillar: ancestral protection. In Month Pillar: career help. In Day Pillar: capable spouse. In Hour Pillar: successful children.
shensha_tianyi_career: Sales, PR, management, consulting — roles needing networks.
shensha_tianyi_health: Generally good health with Nobleman protection.
shensha_tianyi_relationship: Good romance luck. Capable spouse. Noble help in marriage.
shensha_tianyi_advice: Cherish noble helpers. Become a noble helper to others.
shensha_yima_detail: Traveling Horse indicates frequent movement and change. In Year Pillar: early migration. In Month Pillar: job changes. In Day Pillar: spouse from远方. In Hour Pillar: children travel far.
shensha_yima_career: Trade, transport, tourism, journalism, sales, diplomacy.
shensha_yima_health: Watch health during travels. Safety and diet.
shensha_yima_relationship: Possible long-distance relationship or foreign spouse.
shensha_yima_advice: Embrace change. Turn movement into opportunity.
shensha_taohua_detail: Peach Blossom indicates charm and social ability. In Year Pillar: early romance. In Month Pillar: workplace popularity. In Day Pillar: attractive spouse. In Hour Pillar: children have romance luck.
shensha_taohua_career: Entertainment, beauty, PR, social, service industry.
shensha_taohua_health: Enjoyment star. Avoid excess. Maintain regular life.
shensha_taohua_relationship: Very strong opposite-sex attraction. Rich love life.
shensha_taohua_advice: Use charm wisely. Don't沉迷 love games.
shensha_wenchang_detail: Academic Star indicates intelligence and literary talent. Good for exams, promotions, and certifications. In Year Pillar: scholarly family. In Month Pillar: academic excellence. In Day Pillar: cultured spouse. In Hour Pillar: smart children.
shensha_wenchang_health: Rest your brain. Prevent神经衰弱 and eye strain.
shensha_wenchang_advice: Study hard. Take exams. Academic stars help.
shensha_jiangxing_detail: General Star indicates authority and leadership. Good for management positions. In Year Pillar: inherited authority. In Month Pillar: career power. In Day Pillar: authoritative spouse. In Hour Pillar: leadership children.
shensha_jiangxing_health: Overwork risk. Balance work and rest.
shensha_jiangxing_relationship: Strong-willed in love. May seem dominant.
shensha_huagai_summary: Artistic talent, religious tendency, prone to loneliness.
shensha_huagai_detail: Elegant Seal indicates artistic talent and unique thinking. Prone to loneliness. In Year Pillar: artistic family. In Month Pillar: creative work. In Day Pillar: unique spouse. In Hour Pillar: artistic children.
shensha_huagai_career: Art, design, religion, philosophy, research, counseling.
shensha_huagai_relationship: High standards in love. May marry late.
shensha_huagai_advice: Develop artistic talent. Don't be too isolated.
shensha_yangren_summary: Strong will, decisive, impulsive, risk of injury.
shensha_yangren_detail: Goat Blade is the strongest star, indicating fierce will and impulsiveness. Risk of injury. In Year Pillar: strong ancestors. In Month Pillar: competitive work. In Day Pillar: strong-willed spouse. In Hour Pillar: temperamental children.
shensha_yangren_career: Military, law, surgery, metalwork — roles needing decisiveness.
shensha_yangren_health: Risk of injury. Avoid dangerous activities.
shensha_yangren_relationship: Fierce temper in relationships. Learn gentleness.
shensha_yangren_advice: Control impulses. Turn fierceness into resilience.
shensha_lushen_detail: Prosperity Star indicates stable income and material comfort. In Year Pillar: family wealth. In Month Pillar: stable salary. In Day Pillar: wealthy spouse. In Hour Pillar: financially secure晚年.
shensha_lushen_career: Civil service, teaching, accounting, banking — stable income.
shensha_lushen_health: Comfortable life. Don't be too sedentary.
shensha_lushen_relationship: Financial stability helps love. Don't equate money with love.
shensha_hongluan_detail: Red Phoenix indicates marriage and romance. In Year Pillar: early romance. In Month Pillar: workplace romance. In Day Pillar: spouse met during Red Phoenix activation. In Hour Pillar: children marry happily.
shensha_hongluan_advice: Seize Red Phoenix years for romance.
shensha_tianxi_detail: Heavenly Happiness brings joy and dispels disaster. In Year Pillar: family celebrations. In Month Pillar: career success. In Day Pillar: happy marriage. In Hour Pillar: successful children.
shensha_tianxi_career: Service industry, entertainment, education — roles bringing joy.
shensha_jinyu_detail: Golden Carriage indicates wealth and luxury. In Year Pillar: ancestral wealth. In Month Pillar: high income. In Day Pillar: wealthy spouse. In Hour Pillar: prosperous children.
shensha_jinyu_career: Luxury services, finance, investment — high-income industries.
shensha_jinyu_advice: Use material wealth wisely. Seek spiritual growth.
shensha_kuigang_summary: Strong character, decisive, authoritative, risk of conflict.
shensha_kuigang_detail: Fui Kong is a special formation indicating strong character and decisiveness. Risk of conflict if afflicted. Good for military, legal, or executive roles.
shensha_kuigang_career: Military, judiciary, executive, surgery — decisive roles.
shensha_kuigang_relationship: Fierce personality causes conflicts. Be softer.
shensha_guchen_detail: Solitary Star indicates loneliness and wandering. In Year Pillar: early separation from family. In Month Pillar: working alone. In Day Pillar: distant spouse. In Hour Pillar: lonely晚年.
shensha_guchen_career: Research, writing, programming, art — independent work.
shensha_guchen_health: Loneliness affects mental health. Stay social.
shensha_guchen_relationship: Passive in love. May miss opportunities.
shensha_guchen_advice: Socialize more. Develop hobbies. Don't isolate.
shensha_guasu_summary: Loneliness, weak affinity with opposite sex.
shensha_guasu_detail: Widow Star indicates loneliness and weak opposite-sex affinity. In Year Pillar: lacking love in childhood. In Month Pillar: cold workplace relationships. In Day Pillar: distant spouse. In Hour Pillar: lonely晚年.
shensha_guasu_health: Loneliness affects mental health. Stay positive.
shensha_guasu_relationship: Weak romance luck. Must be proactive.
shensha_guasu_advice: Be proactive in love. Don't fear rejection.
shensha_jiesha_detail: Robbery Star indicates wealth loss and conflict. In Year Pillar: ancestral loss. In Month Pillar: workplace disputes. In Day Pillar: spouse causes financial loss. In Hour Pillar: wasteful children.
shensha_jiesha_career: Avoid high-risk investment. Stable income industries.
shensha_jiesha_advice: Be financially careful. Don't trust blindly.
shensha_zaisha_detail: Disaster Star indicates accidents and sudden misfortune. In Year Pillar: ancestral disaster. In Month Pillar: workplace accidents. In Day Pillar: spouse faces misfortune. In Hour Pillar: children safety issues.
shensha_wangshen_detail: Death God indicates anxiety and disputes. In Year Pillar: early restlessness. In Month Pillar: workplace conflicts. In Day Pillar: tense spouse relationship. In Hour Pillar: worrisome children.
shensha_wangshen_career: Strategy, consulting, research — roles needing wisdom.
shensha_wangshen_relationship: Prone to arguments with partner. Communicate more.
shensha_tiande_summary: Star of mitigation, indicates kindness and deep blessings.
shensha_tiande_detail: Heavenly Virtue turns misfortune into blessing. Indicates kindness and deep fortune. In Year Pillar: ancestral virtue. In Month Pillar: personal virtue. In Day Pillar: virtuous spouse. In Hour Pillar: blessed children.
shensha_yuede_summary: Star of hidden merit, turns danger into safety.
shensha_yuede_detail: Monthly Virtue is a hidden merit star. In Year Pillar: ancestral阴德. In Month Pillar: personal阴德. In Day Pillar: spouse helps secretly. In Hour Pillar: blessed children.
shensha_xuetang_detail: Academic Hall indicates intelligence and scholarly success. In Year Pillar: scholarly family. In Month Pillar: academic excellence. In Day Pillar: educated spouse. In Hour Pillar: studious children.
shensha_xuetang_advice: Read and study. Use your scholarly talent.
shensha_taiji_summary: Spiritual, mysterious, good fortune in later life.
shensha_taiji_detail: Taiji Noble indicates spiritual interests and mysterious culture affinity. In Year Pillar: spiritual ancestors. In Month Pillar: interest in metaphysics. In Day Pillar: spiritual spouse. In Hour Pillar: spiritual children.
shensha_tianyimed_detail: Heavenly Doctor indicates medical affinity. In Year Pillar: medical family background. In Month Pillar: health-related career. In Day Pillar: health-conscious spouse. In Hour Pillar: health-focused children.
shensha_tianyimed_advice: Help others with health. Stay健康.
shensha_no_shensha_summary: No prominent symbolic stars in your chart. Focus on your own efforts and choices.
shensha_has_summary: Your chart contains the following symbolic stars:
personality_analysis_strong: Yang Day Master — outgoing and proactive personality. Strong body means abundant personal energy and decisiveness.
personality_analysis_weak: Yang Day Master — outgoing and proactive personality. Weak body means lower personal energy; leverage teamwork.
personality_analysis_yin_strong: Yin Day Master — reserved and observant personality. Strong body means abundant personal energy.
personality_analysis_yin_weak: Yin Day Master — reserved and observant personality. Weak body means lower personal energy.
shishen_bijian_meaning: Same element and polarity as Day Master. Represents self, independence, competition.
shishen_bijian_personality: Independent, confident, assertive. Values own decisions. Honest and loyal.
shishen_jiecai_meaning: Same element, opposite polarity. Represents rivalry, spending, impulsiveness.
shishen_jiecai_personality: Generous, bold, adventurous. Strong social skills but impulsive spending.
shishen_shishen_meaning: Same polarity as Day Master, produced by it. Represents talent, enjoyment.
shishen_shishen_personality: Gentle, optimistic, talented. Enjoys life. Creative.
shishen_shangguan_meaning: Opposite polarity, produced by Day Master. Represents innovation, rebellion.
shishen_shangguan_personality: Sharp-minded, rebellious, innovative. Prone to controversy.
shishen_zhengcai_meaning: Controlled by Day Master, opposite polarity. Represents stable income, wife (male chart).
shishen_zhengcai_personality: Practical, realistic, values stability. Good at financial management.
shishen_piancai_meaning: Controlled by Day Master, same polarity. Represents windfall, father, socializing.
shishen_piancai_personality: Cheerful, generous, sociable. Good investment sense.
shishen_zhengguan_meaning: Controls Day Master, opposite polarity. Represents authority, status, husband (female chart).
shishen_qisha_meaning: Controls Day Master, same polarity. Represents pressure, challenge, power.
shishen_qisha_personality: Decisive, bold, challenges authority. High pressure.
shishen_zhengyin_meaning: Supports Day Master, opposite polarity. Represents learning, noble help, protection.
shishen_zhengyin_personality: Kind, studious, receives help from noble people. Peaceful.
shishen_pianyin_meaning: Supports Day Master, same polarity. Represents unique thinking, solitude.
shishen_pianyin_personality: Unique thinking, sharp intuition. May be solitary.
shishen_summary_bijian: Friend Yang Day Master — outgoing and proactive personali
fortune_sum_bijian_excellent: Great day for collaboration and socializing.
fortune_sum_shishen_excellent: Happy mood, great for creativity and learning.
fortune_sum_shangguan_excellent: Full of ideas, great for innovation.
fortune_sum_zhengguan_excellent: Career luck is high, good for promotions.
fortune_sum_qisha_excellent: Challenges today but you can overcome them.
fortune_sum_zhengyin_excellent: Noble help is strong, good for studying.
fortune_sum_default_excellent: Excellent fortune today, seize the opportunity.
fortune_sum_default_neutral: Steady day, keep to your routine.
